positive: Minimalist line art illustration of intertwining bioluminescent flora and celestial bodies. Focus on stylized, delicate silhouettes of glowing vines, crescent moons, and abstracted nebulae dust. High contrast black and white engraving style with pops of deep teal and amethyst glow. Central composition, highly decorative, vector print quality, clean lines, symmetrical balance, perfect for screen printing on fabric, deep jungle atmosphere, fantasy botanical design.
